evidence_quotes.quote: Now that the servers have shut down I no longer have access to these games
that law of digital goods just changes slightly to include games so that no more games may be lost in the future

paragraphs.text: Hello, I used to buy games back when I was still a kid which were mostly server-dependant (src: Nintendo 3DS shop). Now that the servers have shut down I no longer have access to these games and thats a shame since that was a big part of my childhood and it's now gone forever. I'm not asking to force publishers to re-open those stores but rather that the law of digital goods just changes slightly to include games so that no more games may be lost in the future and the next generation wont have to fear losing their childhood memories. Best regards, L.Z.
